positive: Minimalist celestial map illustration featuring a whimsical, stylized crescent moon cradling a cluster of geometrically perfect stars and constellations. The style is modern botanical-meets-astrology, utilizing deep sapphire blue, soft gold foil accents, and crisp matte white negative space. The composition is perfectly centered and designed with clear, scalable elements suitable for high-contrast apparel printing. High detail, clean linework, ethereal glow, graphic design quality, vector illustration aesthetic. --ar 1:1
